description_long: This kiosk features an octagonal structure with a light blue, flat, overhanging roof and a sturdy, light gray body. The front is open with a wide service window and a protruding counter, ideal for customer interaction. Prominent signage is visible: a large blue information symbol above the main opening and a colorful geometric logo on the side panels. The kiosk has open sides supported by columns, providing visibility and accessibility, while the rear is mostly enclosed with a single large rectangular opening. The materials appear to be primarily painted metal or composite panels, with some glass or acrylic in the window areas. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use as an information booth or ticket kiosk in urban environments.
description: A modern, octagonal kiosk with a blue flat roof, open service window, and prominent signage, designed for public information or ticketing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the geometric logo and the protruding service counter with an open window.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide open service window, blue counter, and large information sign above the entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with another geometric logo and a partial view of the service window and counter.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a large rectangular opening and the solid back structure with no signage.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with blue information symbol above entrance; printed geometric logo on side panels.
attribute_window_presence: One large open window at the front, rectangular in shape.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway at the rear, no visible doors.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, octagonal roof with slight overhang, painted light blue, no visible decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist with functional design and clean lines.
